category_sources: source_facts.description says VeryFastTree performs efficient phylogenetic tree inference for massive taxonomic datasets; official README repeats that scope.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists VeryFastTree; official repository README title is VeryFastTree.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; official GitHub README provides getting started, build, and running documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/citiususc/veryfasttree; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies phylogenetic tree inference; official README states compatibility with FastTree-2 command-line arguments and large alignments.
